rationale.R1.6: The agent provided a detailed and careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, improving multiple problem paragraphs and suggesting specific rewrites.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged several uncertainties and unsupported claims but did not explicitly mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identified harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were suggested but not traced to sources or reasons.
